title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.530 - Convicted offender not to be transferred to state where wanted for crime
text:
217.530.  Convicted offender not to be transferred to state where wanted for crime. — No part of this law may be used to transfer a Missouri convicted offender against his will from Missouri to a state where he is wanted for the commission of any criminal offense.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 112, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
